<!--
Thanks for opening a PR! Please review the checklist below before submitting.
-->

## Description

<!-- What does this PR change and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor / chore

## Related issue

<!-- Fixes #123, Closes #123 -->

## How was this tested?

<!-- Commands you ran, tests added, manual verification steps. -->

- [ ] Added/updated tests under `PocketGraphRAG/tests/`
- [ ] `ruff check .` passes
- [ ] `ruff format --check .` passes
- [ ] `pytest PocketGraphRAG/tests/` passes

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines (`ruff`)
- [ ] I added type hints to new code
- [ ] I updated `CHANGELOG.md` under `[Unreleased]` if user-facing
- [ ] I updated docs / README if needed
- [ ] I did **not** commit secrets, `.env`, or large binaries
